Private Team Benchmarks

## Private team benchmarks that make adoption impossible to guess at

Turn individual usage into a shared operating view for adoption, consistency, breadth, and savings without turning your team into a public anonymized leaderboard.

### Activity

Who is generating the most AI usage right now

### Consistency

Who keeps usage steady day after day

### Cache Efficiency

Who is creating the strongest savings signal

### Adoption

Who is using AI tools across the broadest surface area

### Private and secure by default

Scoreboards are scoped to your organization and protected by role-based access control. Only owners, admins, and authorized members can view rankings. Workspace member names stay inside this private internal view. The public leaderboard uses aliases only. It never uses real names, account names, or emails.

[See benchmarks](https://costhawk.ai/team-benchmarks)

Trust & Privacy

## Security-first by design

Whether you connect via Admin API keys, wrapped proxy keys, or MCP telemetry — your credentials are encrypted, we do not store prompt or code content, and you control what gets shared.

Connect local tools

One command authenticates your machine and installs the CostHawk MCP for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Gemini CLI.

npm exec --yes costhawk@latest -- --login
Compatible Claude Code OpenAI Codex CLI Cursor Gemini CLI

### AES-256 key encryption

Admin API keys are encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM. We never store or see your keys in plaintext.

### Wrapped key isolation

Proxy your API calls through CostHawk. Your real provider keys never touch your codebase or client devices.

### Local-first parsing

MCP telemetry is computed locally from supported developer-tool data directories before anything leaves your machine.

### No prompt storage

We only persist usage metadata: token counts, models, timestamps, and hashed project IDs. Prompt and code content is never stored.

### Preview before upload

Dry-run syncs show exactly what would be sent, with payload previews and optional file lists for full transparency.

### Opt-in auto-sync

Automatic uploads are off by default. Enable with COSTHAWK_AUTO_SYNC=true and disable Codex sync anytime.

FAQ

## Frequently Asked Questions

What is CostHawk?+
CostHawk is an AI adoption monitoring platform for engineering teams. It tracks who on your team is using AI tools, how much they cost, and how adoption is trending — across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and other providers.

How does CostHawk track my team's AI usage?+
CostHawk supports three integration methods: MCP telemetry (local-first, no admin keys needed), admin API sync for organization-wide data, or wrapped proxy keys that sit between your code and the provider.

Are Team Benchmarks private?+
Yes. Team Benchmarks are scoped to your organization and protected by role-based access control. Workspace member names are visible only to authorized members. The public leaderboard uses aliases only. It never uses real names, account names, or emails.

What providers does CostHawk support?+
OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Mistral, Cohere, DeepSeek, Groq, Meta, Perplexity, Together, AWS Bedrock, and Azure OpenAI. We add new providers regularly.

Does CostHawk store my prompts or code?+
No. CostHawk only stores usage metadata: token counts, model names, and timestamps. We never see, store, or process your prompts, responses, or code.

How do I get started?+
Sign up, invite your team, and connect via MCP telemetry or admin API keys. The entire setup takes under 5 minutes.
